title: Call of Block
body:
The modpack main feature uses TACZ guns for the gun PvP.

With the help of ParCool, the movement is way more dinamic and flexible, making it more fun and creative.

Then we have gliders, custom npc's for picking your weapons and customize it however you want it in the shooting range, to test the balistic of the weapons. 

----------------------------------------------------------------------------

I put together this modpack trying to create a battle royale, FPS, for multiplayer, which turned out close to warzone, with some more flexible and fast movement if practiced. 

**It's not meant to be played survival**. But played online with a group of people.

**Downloading the modpack doesn't include the minigame itself**, the minigame is in small Datapacks i made(i haven't planned to make it public yet), and a bit of physical redstone for the deathmatch functions.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------

You can play soon on a server i'll host, you can join the [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/y8JRduKyZA) server for This minigame.

I took a map from the comunity and placed markers for chest generation and made a datapack to run the entire minigame, making functions for each event.

The Minigame includes:

- Battle Royale on the map SHMAR

- Deathmatch

- And 2 small tutorials for the Parkour mod and Health system
